title: Everything Animated!
description:
Animate your minecraft!
Adds animations for items without
optifine.
body:
[](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/owls!/gallery)![Logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/tDteH8gZ/images/0df70689518671b6cd390eed9a15faf09c68dcac.png) - - - - - -

✨️Item overhaul!✨️

Animate your world with vanilla friendly animated textures!
### ⭐️QOL If you are experiencing textures getting stuck on weird frames make sure you have this setting turned **off** when using sodium! \ Options > Video Settings > Performance > ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XGxg0qHy/images/00ffd7fda195605aee1a2d194db9a6ea8fc0a55c_350.webp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XGxg0qHy/images/00ffd7fda195605aee1a2d194db9a6ea8fc0a55c_350.webp)

🖼Gallery

**THE GALLERY DOESN'T SHOW ALL THE TEXTURES THERE'S OBVIOUSLY MORE THAN 4** \ When you visit the gallery of this project keep in mind that the keyframes don't always reflect what's in game because every texture is controlled by a .mcmeta file, which adds various delays or keyframe swaps so it's visually pleasing, and not a bunch of colors on your items.

🌐Development

This project is in early development, expect a lot of updates.
### 🏅Contribute Want to take part in making of the textures/animations? Want more updates? You can chat with me on discord and help to improve the pack!
